texto: There’s no need to apologise, Justine,' he said tautly. 'No need at all.''Good, because I didn’t mean to. It’s a habit with females, that’s all, saying sorry all the time when there’s absolutely no need. . .
explicacao: Citação de Miranda Lee sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “There’s no need to apologise, Justine,' he said tautly. 'No need at all.''Good, because I didn’t …” articula reflexao, feminist, there em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
